citations.narrative:
There are two enclosures that are not being kept in good repair. In an enclosure housing three raccoons, one of the
support poles is rusted through near the base, creating a hole with jagged edges that the animals can access. In an
enclosure housing three kinkajou, multiple bars on the front panel of the enclosure have thick pieces of flaking rust. These
flakes are sharp and are in an area where the animals can access them.
Enclosures that are not kept in good repair, including areas of excessive rust, can result in injury to the animals from
sharp or jagged edges. The facility must be constructed of such material and of such strength as appropriate for the
animals involved. The housing facilities shall be maintained in good repair to protect the animals from injury and to contain
the animals.
To be corrected by May 26, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensees.
n

narrative:
3.125(a) 
   
Facilities, general. 
There are two enclosures that are not being kept in good repair. In an enclosure housing three raccoons, one of the 
support poles is rusted through near the base, creating a hole with jagged edges that the animals can access. In an 
enclosure housing three kinkajou, multiple bars on the front panel of the enclosure have thick pieces of flaking rust. These 
flakes are sharp and are in an area where the animals can access them. 
 
Enclosures that are not kept in good repair, including areas of excessive rust, can result in injury to the animals from 
sharp or jagged edges. The facility must be constructed of such material and of such strength as appropriate for the 
animals involved. The housing facilities shall be maintained in good repair to protect the animals from injury and to contain 
the animals. 
To be corrected by May 26, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensees. 
 
 n
